title: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
notes:
1. New Hero: Fallen Scarlet - Hirara: A geisha Assassin wielding Twin Fans: Ukifune, capable of combining them to unleash different combos.
2. S41 will start from 00:00:00 on 06/17 (Server Time). Complete Ranked matches to claim rewards including S41 Seasonal Skin: Zhask "Icespawn Scourge" and S41 Avatar Border "Scarlet Embers".

title: BitLife - Life Simulator
notes:
Let's get ready to rumble, Bitizens! The Ultimate Fighter Mode is now available for purchase. Head over to the BitLife Marketplace and start your journey to become the ultimate fighter today! Here's what's included:

- Choose a fighting specialty
- Brawl with randos on the street
- Compete in the Ultimate Fighting League
- Learn 100+ fighting moves
- SO MUCH MORE!

Hit us up on our socials for more info and updates. While you're there, send us your craziest moments!

title: Star Wars™: Galaxy of Heroes
notes: Hey, Galaxy of Heroes fans! We’ve added some quality of life improvements in this update to make your game a more seamless experience. Have fun on the Holotables!

title: Farm Heroes Saga
notes: Come on down to the Farm for a fresh update! We’ve fixed some bugs and refined levels to give you our best gameplay yet.
